source.name: Funding Positions of CalPERS Contracting Agencies

cadence: annual (actuarial valuations, published ~a year after each June 30)
caveats: Covers CalPERS contracting agencies with their own actuarial plans. Small agencies pooled into CalPERS risk pools are reported only in aggregate elsewhere, and governments with independent retirement systems — Los Angeles (city and county), San Francisco, and about 20 county systems — are not in CalPERS data at all.
Unfunded liability is the gap between what's been promised and what's been set aside, at the actuary's assumptions; it is a debt paid down through future budgets.
